headline: Assessing DTE Energy (DTE) Valuation As Recent Momentum Meets A 3.5% Undervaluation View
summary: Why DTE Energy (DTE) Is Drawing Investor Attention Now DTE Energy (DTE) is back on investors’ radar after a recent trading session that left the stock slightly lower on the day but roughly flat over the past month. See our latest analysis for DTE Energy. The recent share price at US$149.68 sits alongside a strong 90 day share price return of 14.86% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 19.16%, suggesting momentum has been building over both shorter and longer horizons. headline: Michigan Rallies Put DTE Data Center Growth And Valuation In Focus
summary: Rallies are being organized across Michigan to protest DTE Energy’s role in data center expansion and its political donations. State lawmakers are advancing measures that include a proposed moratorium on new data centers and potential repeal of related tax breaks. The actions reflect growing concern about how new data center facilities and utility political spending could affect communities and ratepayers.
